{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.3": 4, "R1.6": 3, "RX.1": 5, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 4, "RX.5": 4},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent provides detailed critiques of logical errors and misinterpretations in the paragraph, which aligns with the evidence provided.",
    "R1.6": "While the agent offers substantial revisions to improve clarity, it does not provide a careful copy-edit pass or maintain consistent register throughout the entire text.",
    "RX.1": "The agent clearly marks the logical errors and misinterpretations as areas of uncertainty, providing specific feedback on what needs to be corrected.",
    "RX.3": "The agent covers all aspects of the paragraph without any significant drift from the original scope or active set.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies several issues that could lead to downstream harm if not addressed, such as misinterpretation and unsupported claims.",
    "RX.5": "While the agent provides detailed critiques, it does not trace every non-cosmetic change back to specific sources in the original text."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent provides detailed critiques of logical errors and misinterpretations in the paragraph, which aligns with the evidence provided.
rationale.R1.6: While the agent offers substantial revisions to improve clarity, it does not provide a careful copy-edit pass or maintain consistent register throughout the entire text.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks the logical errors and misinterpretations as areas of uncertainty, providing specific feedback on what needs to be corrected.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covers all aspects of the paragraph without any significant drift from the original scope or active set.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies several issues that could lead to downstream harm if not addressed, such as misinterpretation and unsupported claims.
rationale.RX.5: While the agent provides detailed critiques, it does not trace every non-cosmetic change back to specific sources in the original text.
